executionMode.name: autonomous_until_done
executionMode.description: After the start phrase, execute tasks, verify, record bugs, fix, retest, and continue until done or blocked.

attemptLimits.onExceeded: Mark task blocked, record attempts and blockers, stop autonomous execution, and report.

noConfirmationNeededFor: Update task, bug, changelog, and dev-log files
Fix bugs directly related to active tasks
taskLoop: Set status doing and increment attempts
Record and fix bugs on failure
definitionOfDone: Required verification passes or skips are justified
